TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Kuan_Yuan_u_pasimalan_tu_kazizeng_u_tulakang_niza_pakaala_tu_2374_depah,_malingatu_tu_pacakay_tu_“Yunduan_pacang”, title = Kuan_Yuan_u_pasimalan_tu_kazizeng_u_tulakang_niza_pakaala_tu_2374_depah,_malingatu_tu_pacakay_tu_“Yunduan_pacang”, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kuan_Yuan_u_pasimalan_tu_kazizeng_u_tulakang_niza_pakaala_tu_2374_depah,_malingatu_tu_pacakay_tu_“Yunduan_pacang”} }

S.FORM: == tatangahan:(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) == Kuan Yuan u pasimalan tu kazizeng u tulakang niza pakaala tu 2374 depah, malingatu tu pacakay tu "Yunduan pacang" kakaliman:(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) zungyuw a pasimalan tu kazizeng u tulakang niza pakaala tu 2374 depah misakapah tu limaay a bulad, ayza a demiad malingatu tu mipacakay tu simal, singangan i Taywan walu zazan, cacay a bulad kunipacakay pkala tu lima malebut kunupacakay tu pacang, == nilaculan: ==
S.PHON: == tataŋaħan:(mikawawaj-kar~ɾumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~ɾumjiti sakatizəŋ baŋu) == kuan juan u pasimar~ɾan tu kazizəŋ u tur~ɾakaŋ niza pakaar~ɾa tu **** dəpaħ, mar~ɾiŋatu tu paʦakaj tu "junduan paʦaŋ" kakar~ɾiman:(mikawawaj-kar~ɾumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~ɾumjiti sakatizəŋ baŋu) zuŋjuw a pasimar~ɾan tu kazizəŋ u tur~ɾakaŋ niza pakaar~ɾa tu **** dəpaħ misakapaħ tu r~ɾimaaj a bur~ɾad, ajza a dəmiad mar~ɾiŋatu tu mipaʦakaj tu simar~ɾ, siŋaŋan i tajwan war~ɾu zazan, ʦaʦaj a bur~ɾad kunipaʦakaj pkar~ɾa tu r~ɾima mar~ɾəbut kunupaʦakaj tu paʦaŋ, == nir~ɾaʦur~ɾan: ==
S.FORM: == tatangahan:(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) == Kuan Yuan u pasimalan tu kazizeng u tulakang niza pakaala tu 2374 depah, malingatu tu pacakay tu "Yunduan pacang" kakaliman:(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) zungyuw a pasimalan tu kazizeng u tulakang niza pakaala tu 2374 depah misakapah tu limaay a bulad, ayza a demiad malingatu tu mipacakay tu simal, singangan i Taywan walu zazan, cacay a bulad kunipacakay pkala tu lima malebut kunupacakay tu pacang, == nilaculan: ==
S.PHON: == tataŋaħan:(mikawawaj-kar~ɾumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~ɾumjiti sakatizəŋ baŋu) == kuan juan u pasimar~ɾan tu kazizəŋ u tur~ɾakaŋ niza pakaar~ɾa tu **** dəpaħ, mar~ɾiŋatu tu paʦakaj tu "junduan paʦaŋ" kakar~ɾiman:(mikawawaj-kar~ɾumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~ɾumjiti sakatizəŋ baŋu) zuŋjuw a pasimar~ɾan tu kazizəŋ u tur~ɾakaŋ niza pakaar~ɾa tu **** dəpaħ misakapaħ tu r~ɾimaaj a bur~ɾad, ajza a dəmiad mar~ɾiŋatu tu mipaʦakaj tu simar~ɾ, siŋaŋan i tajwan war~ɾu zazan, ʦaʦaj a bur~ɾad kunipaʦakaj pkar~ɾa tu r~ɾima mar~ɾəbut kunupaʦakaj tu paʦaŋ, == nir~ɾaʦur~ɾan: ==
